description: You are a private pilot using the Avare EFB to plan a VFR cross-country flight from San Francisco International (KSFO) to Las Vegas (KLAS). Professional VFR pilots use intermediate VOR radio navigation fixes to stay on airways and clear obstructions. Build a flight plan on the VFR Sectional display that includes at least three intermediate navaids or airports along the route, for a total of at least five waypoints. Save the completed flight plan.
